result.reply:
Maine dekha ki aapko ek naya skill banana hai jiska naam hoga "agent deletion" skill.

**🧠 Reasoning:**
Yeh ek system-level functionality hai jiske liye naya code likhna padega. Isliye, main **`Advanced Coding`** skill ka use karungi. Yeh skill mujhe naye tools aur skills banane ki power deta hai.

**🛠️ Proposed Plan:**
1.  I will use the **`Advanced Coding`** skill.
2.  I will instruct the system to write a new skill, let's call it `agent_deletion_skill`.
3.  This skill will need to interact with the system's agent management layer to safely terminate an agent by name.

**💡 Suggestion:**
Kya aap chahti hain ki main is naye skill ko banate samay koi specific error handling ya confirmation step add karun? Otherwise, I will build the core deletion logic.

Confirm karu?
